description: Precise register. Standard depth with disclosure_domain_count=2 — exposes exactly two semantic domains rather than the default three. No discourse markers. Occupies the focused/technical pole: more substantive than terse_v1 (count=1) but narrower than default_neutral_v1 (count=3). Grounding source and trace hash are invariant against default_neutral_v1 except for the override application. See ADR-0068, ADR-0070.
